items.title: Add UNIQUE(post_id, platform_id) on post_variants
items.acceptanceCheck: Rebuild variants for same post+platform succeeds; no duplicate rows

items.title: Fix sign-url path validation to accept posts/ prefix
items.acceptanceCheck: POST /api/sign-url with posts/… path returns signed URL

items.title: Remove Phase 4 fields from CLIENT_ONLY_FIELDS
items.acceptanceCheck: updatePost() with variant_strategy persists to Supabase

items.title: Fix allFinalFailed using stale deliveries array
items.acceptanceCheck: All deliveries exhaust retries → schedule status = failed

items.title: Re-fetch connection after rotateTokensIfNeeded()
items.acceptanceCheck: Expired token causes delivery to fail with correct error message

items.title: Fix hasRealMetricsFetcher() always returning true
items.acceptanceCheck: hasRealMetricsFetcher('instagram') returns false with dry-run only

items.title: Fix overview API ignoring days filter for totals
items.acceptanceCheck: Selecting 7 days shows only last-7-day totals

items.title: Auth-gate or remove legacy /api/publish/run
items.acceptanceCheck: Unauthenticated POST to /api/publish/run returns 401

items.title: Add ON DELETE SET NULL on post_deliveries.connection_id FK
items.acceptanceCheck: Deleting a connection doesn't cause FK violations

items.title: Add timeout on publisher.publish() calls
items.acceptanceCheck: Hung publisher aborted after 30s

items.title: Make rollup upsert atomic in ingest runner
items.acceptanceCheck: Concurrent ingest runs don't create duplicate rollups

items.title: Fix time-series double-counting cumulative snapshots
items.acceptanceCheck: Time-series chart values = latest metrics per delivery per day

items.title: Derive imageMimeType from variant format instead of hardcoded jpeg
items.acceptanceCheck: PNG/WebP variants published with correct MIME type

items.title: Fix cancel vs publish runner race condition
items.acceptanceCheck: Cancelling a just-claimed schedule returns 409

items.title: Wire single_image strategy for publishing
items.acceptanceCheck: single_image post has image attached during publish

items.title: Add path validation on upload-source
items.acceptanceCheck: Uploading to ../../evil.json rejected

items.title: Add auth to analytics API routes
items.acceptanceCheck: Unauthenticated GET to /api/analytics/overview returns 401

items.title: Remove redundant status ternary in publish runner
items.acceptanceCheck: Code review: no ternary with identical branches

items.title: Clear encrypted tokens on disconnect
items.acceptanceCheck: Revoking connection nullifies token columns in DB

items.title: Add pagination to analytics API routes
items.acceptanceCheck: ?page=2&pageSize=20 returns correct slice

items.title: Add user feedback for analytics UI fetch errors
items.acceptanceCheck: Network errors show toast or inline message

items.title: Parallelize Sharp variant building
items.acceptanceCheck: Build time reduced for multi-platform builds

items.title: Batch signed URL generation in fetchVariants()
items.acceptanceCheck: Single Supabase call replaces N calls

items.title: Add pagination to schedules listing
items.acceptanceCheck: ?page=2&pageSize=20 works correctly

items.title: Stop writing stale public_url column
items.acceptanceCheck: saveVariant() doesn't generate signed URL during save

items.title: NormalizedMetrics.currency typed as literal null
items.acceptanceCheck: currency: string | null compiles

items.title: Inline PostRow type in analytics page — import from database.ts
items.acceptanceCheck: Single source of truth for PostRow type

items.title: Add max-age cutoff for engagement ingestion
items.acceptanceCheck: Deliveries older than 90 days skipped

items.title: Remove dead FORTY_EIGHT_HOURS_MS constant
items.acceptanceCheck: No unused constants
